name: Normalize Reference Data with Deduplication
description: Extract and normalize category reference data, fixing typos in the process

checks.name: categories has exactly 2 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM categories;
checks.description: Only 2 distinct categories after deduplication: Electronics and Furniture

checks.name: No typos in category names
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM categories WHERE category_name NOT IN ('Electronics', 'Furniture');
checks.description: All category names must be exactly 'Electronics' or 'Furniture'

checks.name: products has 7 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM products;
checks.description: All 7 products from raw_products should be in the products table

checks.name: All products link to a valid category
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM products p WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM categories c WHERE c.category_id = p.category_id);
checks.description: Every product must have a valid category_id FK

checks.name: Standing Desk maps to Furniture
checks.query: SELECT c.category_name FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id WHERE p.product_id = 4;
checks.description: Product 4 (Standing Desk) had a typo 'Furnitur' — must map to Furniture
